title: Worktree Sync, File Discovery & Overlay Integration

chapters.title: Filesystem Foundations
build_steps: Define FsReadFileReq struct with path field
Define FsWriteFileReq struct with path, content, create_dirs
Add Fs variants to crate::types::tool_io::ToolInput enum
Implement execute() for each Fs request scoped by ServerId
Wire ToolInput::FsReadFile/FsWriteFile into the dispatch match
Scope filesystem access using ShellWorktreeType

chapters.title: File I/O & Access Control
chapters.tagline: Giving the Model a Hand to Write Files
build_steps: Define FsWriteFileReq struct with core fields
Add derives for Debug and Deserialize
Implement execute() to create parent directories
Write file contents via execute()
Wire FsWriteFileReq into the tool dispatcher

chapters.title: Discovery, Search & Indexing
build_steps: Define FileIndexEntry struct with path and metadata
Build FileIndex with in-memory HashMap store
Implement embedded_search_tools.rs scoring function
Implement path_suggestions.rs fuzzy matcher
Harden path_suggestions_production.rs with limits
Wire search_remote_sync.rs to refresh index on demand

chapters.title: Storage & Persistence
chapters.tagline: Giving Grok's Agent a Durable Memory
build_steps: Define MemoryLogEntry struct and append-only writer
Implement IndexManager mapping ids to file offsets
Wire append() to update the index on every write
Define Checkpoint struct and snapshot writer
Implement recover() replaying log entries after last checkpoint

chapters.title: Worktree Core Operations
chapters.tagline: Isolated Git Workspaces for Agent Edits
build_steps: Define WorktreeManager struct with repo root path
Implement run_git_command helper for subprocess calls
Implement create_worktree(path, branch) method
Implement list_worktrees() returning parsed entries
Implement remove_worktree(path) with existence check
Add unit tests covering create, list, remove lifecycle

chapters.title: Session & State Management
chapters.tagline: The Ledger Behind Every Agent Turn
build_steps: Define SessionState struct with core fields
Implement update_goal and update_plan_status methods
Wire plan_approval_resume.rs to call update_plan_status
Add goal_strategist.rs hook for update_goal
Emit structured log entries from log.rs on state changes
Write tests.rs covering state transitions

chapters.title: Git Backend Integration
chapters.tagline: Fast, Isolated Git Worktrees for Agents
key_concepts: Reflink (CoW) Directory Copy as the Standalone Worktree Strategy
Skip-List Filtering of Transient & Stale Git State
Sharded Parallel Copy for Large Object Stores
build_steps: Define GitDirCopyError enum for copy failures
Implement is_git_dir path validator
Implement recursive copy_gitdir_contents walker
Implement public copy_gitdir entry point
Add unit tests with tempfile fixtures
Wire copy_gitdir into worktree creation call site

chapters.title: Environment & Configuration
build_steps: Implement HomePaths resolver in home_paths.rs
Define Config struct and I/O in config_toml_edit.rs
Define EnvKind enum and EnvProvider trait
Implement Python, Rust, and Builtin providers
Wire providers and config together in envrc.rs

chapters.title: Installation & Package Management
chapters.tagline: How Grok Installs and Manages Plugins
build_steps: Define PluginRegistry struct and lookup method
Define PluginBundle struct for packaged plugin contents
Implement asset resize utility for bundle icons
Implement legacy_0_4_10 format converter
Implement Installer orchestrating registry, bundle, and legacy paths

chapters.title: Communication & Networking
chapters.tagline: The Hub That Lets Grok Act
build_steps: Define TerminalCommand and TerminalResponse wire types
Write round-trip serialize/deserialize test harness
Define Channel trait with send method
Implement Channel for local process transport
Implement Channel for REST transport
Wire hub dispatch to select Channel implementation

chapters.title: Security & Trust Architecture
build_steps: Define Evidence struct and EvidenceKind enum
Implement EvidenceStore for collection and retrieval
Define EmbeddingVector type and embed_evidence function
Implement ReputationScore lookup in marketplace.rs
Define TrustScore struct combining similarity and reputation
Expose is_trusted threshold check for callers

chapters.title: Testing & Concurrency Patterns
chapters.tagline: Testing Concurrency in Grok's Session Layer
build_steps: Build shared mock session test harness
Test reverse-request/session_id correlation
Write test_fork_session.rs for concurrent forking
Write test_blitz_cancel.rs for rapid cancel races
Write test_subagent_orphan_reconcile.rs
Write test_session_concurrent_update.rs for concurrent updates
